profile_backing.full_profile_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-pass173-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(cholesky_1024x1024_f64|cholesky_512x512_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_256x128_f64|matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64)' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --noplot
profile_backing.route_reason: GEMM2048 remained top, but frankenjax-p1vbf.39 closed recursive/Strassen-style FP-reordered GEMM under the current bit-exact ascending-k direct-matmul contract. Exact-order GEMM micro/layout families were already in rejection streak, so pass173 attacked the next structural non-GEMM primitive named by pass172: Cholesky lower-packed private workspace.

focused_baseline.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-a7sf0-old-pair2 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(cholesky_1024x1024_f64|cholesky_512x512_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 12 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 5 --noplot
focused_baseline.source_state: restored old source; crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs diff empty before this baseline run

candidate.lever: lower-packed private workspace for blocked real Cholesky
candidate.description: Stored the private Cholesky work matrix as packed lower-triangular storage, copied only lower input entries into that workspace, performed diagonal factorization, panel solve, and Schur update through lower-packed indexing, then materialized public row-major L at the boundary.

proof_test.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-a7sf0-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib cholesky -- --nocapture
proof_test.details: 13 focused Cholesky tests passed in candidate state, including packed-lower Schur update comparison against the previous row-major lower update and full-GEMM lower-triangle reference.

rebench.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-a7sf0-candidate-pair1 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(cholesky_1024x1024_f64|cholesky_512x512_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 12 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 5 --noplot

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate preserved diagonal block order, panel row order, lower-triangle p/q traversal, and c=0..jb contribution order for each consumed lower-triangle Schur entry. Public L materialization remained row-major lower-triangular with strict upper zeros.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A: Cholesky has no comparison tie-breaking behavior.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate changed private addressing/storage only. It introduced no mixed precision, FMA, reduction tree change, tolerance contract, or public NaN/signed-zero policy change for consumed lower-triangle entries.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: Cholesky consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: No public dtype/shape/error surface changed in candidate state.

alien_source.primitive_family: packed triangular storage and communication-avoiding dense factorization
alien_source.applied_slice: Tested packed lower-triangular private storage for blocked Cholesky after q-lane SIMD lower-SYRK regressed.

next_primitive.target: reprofile restored source and attack a deeper non-GEMM linalg primitive
next_primitive.reason: Lower-packed private workspace increased index arithmetic and cache behavior did not clear the gate. Do not repeat this workspace family; move to a different structural primitive such as communication-avoiding/recursive Cholesky panel scheduling with explicit bit-order proof, blocked LU/QR structure if it ranks higher, or behavior-contract work where FP reordering is required.
proof_obligations: floating-point operation order unchanged unless a separate behavior-contract bead admits tolerance
next_primitive.fallback_trigger: Reject and restore source if same-worker RCH Criterion data fails Score>=2.0.
